system.flavor: You chant a word of making, and the world explodes with holy light.
system.effect:
Area Effect take 2 piercing damage, or 2d3 piercing if there was a defeated ally in the area.
All allies in the area gain vigor depending on their hp amount:
• Above 50%: 1 vigor
• Bloodied: 1d3+1
• Crisis: 3d3+3. May heal over vigor maximum. At the end of an ally's turn, reduce down to their maximum if higher.
• Defeated rescued.
Conserve foe in the center space is branded and must save or be stunned.
